title: Décor Snap n Seal 1L Stainless Steel Water Bottle with Straw, BPA Free - Leakproof Metal Flask with Carry Handle for School, Travel, Work & Gym - Ideal Drinking Bottle for Kids & Adults - Pink
features: THE DECOR SNAP N SEAL LID - an innovative lid that locks the spout in place, allowing for quick, mess-free sips without removing the cap, ideal for staying hydrated and hygenic.

LEAKPROOF - With an airtight seal to prevent leaks, this bottle is perfect for kids to take to school or adults to take on the go and for sports, work, travel, or the gym, this extra-capacity metal bottle with straw keeps you hydrated through longer days with fewer refills.
SOFT TOUCH FINISH - High quality water bottle with a sleek, soft touch finish in matte pink.
VERSATILE USE - Whether it’s school, sports and excursions or work, travel and the gym, this water bottle is designed to suit all lifestyles, keeping your drink cold wherever you go.
